name: 法玛斯 | ZX81 彩色
descriptionEn: A cheap option for cash-strapped players, the FAMAS effectively fills the niche between more expensive rifles and the less-effective SMGs. This custom paint job uses gaming PCs of old as inspiration. Its black base has been finished with multicolored accents. Clive would be proud
descriptionZh: 给手头紧的玩家的一个廉价选择，法玛斯有效地填补了昂贵的步枪和杀伤力较低的微型冲锋枪之间的空缺。 这把武器以旧时的游戏电脑为灵感来源进行了自定义涂装，黑色底座采用多色加以点缀。 家用计算机先驱将以你为荣
